translated: And that's it for today's look at Grow Glorious Grow... that's a mouthful.
If you haven't finished reading Grow Glorious Grow yet, you'll be able to read the full event story from the archives once the next event starts.
So please, read it as many times as you like.
The scenes I mentioned earlier that we didn't get to watch together today are all in there too,
I'd be so happy if you're reading and think, "Oh, Hon-chan mentioned this part!"
And with that, thank you all for sticking with me for so long today.
